weightedEvidence: Not assigned from literature count alone
scoringGuidance: Reserve for fleet-frequency data showing repeated or nearly inevitable occurrence.

weightedEvidence: Not assigned from literature count alone
scoringGuidance: Reserve for confirmed frequent fleet occurrence or strong operational-rate evidence.
Use when many independent records report the same component/failure/cause combination.
Use when the evidence base suggests recurrence across records, especially with EASA AD support.
Use for documented issues with several records but not enough to imply high recurrence.
Use for limited but credible repeated evidence.
Use for sparse evidence with more than one record or one EASA-supported record.
Use for isolated literature or report evidence.
Use when evidence supports rare occurrence rather than simply low publication count.
Use only when occurrence is credibly remote or absent from relevant evidence.
